message:
Integrate FrankenTerm crates into workspace, add scripting/mux/async beads

Workspace integration:
- Add 30 FrankenTerm crates as workspace members
- Replace 4 git deps with 30 path deps + ~80 external deps
- Rename feature flags: vendored → frankenterm (with backward compat)
- Resolve version conflicts: thiserror 2.0, bitflags 1.3/2.0, notify 5.0

Bead updates (24 new, 6 updated, 2 superseded):
- wa-3dfxb: Revised from "Lua Elimination" to "Scripting Engine —
  Lua + WASM Dual Runtime" (Option C: keep Lua + add wasmtime)
- wa-3dfxb.1-13: ScriptingEngine trait, LuaEngine, WasmEngine,
  sandbox, config detection, migration tool, extension system, docs
- wa-2dd4s.1-5: FrankenMux sub-beads (Zellij analysis, floating panes,
  swap layouts, constraint resize, integration)
- wa-brc7d.1-6: asupersync migration for FrankenTerm crates
  (promise, codec, async_ossl, config, mux, wezterm-ssh)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
